mapper.select: SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", source_medical_record_id AS "sourceMedicalRecordId", report_date AS "reportDate", status AS "status", last_visit_snapshot_json AS "lastVisitSnapshotJson", observation_text AS "observationText", conclusion_text AS "conclusionText", recovery_status AS "recoveryStatus", generated_by AS "generatedBy", finalized_at AS "finalizedAt", creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM follow_up_visit_report WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY creation_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", source_medical_record_id AS "sourceMedicalRecordId", report_date AS "reportDate", status AS "status", last_visit_snapshot_json AS "lastVisitSnapshotJson", observation_text AS "observationText", conclusion_text AS "conclusionText", recovery_status AS "recoveryStatus", generated_by AS "generatedBy", finalized_at AS "finalizedAt", creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM follow_up_visit_report WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE follow_up_visit_report SET observation_text = #{observationText}, conclusion_text = #{conclusionText}, recovery_status = COALESCE(#{recoveryStatus}, recovery_status), last_visit_snapshot_json = COALESCE(#{lastVisitSnapshotJson}::jsonb, last_visit_snapshot_json), source_medical_record_id = COALESCE(#{sourceMedicalRecordId}, source_medical_record_id) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'draft'
UPDATE follow_up_visit_report SET status = 'finalized', finalized_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, generated_by = COALESCE(#{generatedBy}, generated_by) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'draft'
